title: Crew project profile
description: Per-project context for the crew plugin. Written once by `/crew:init`, committed at .crew/profile.json, and read by the assemble skill and its agents so the same flow runs in any repo.

trunk.description: The integration branch efforts merge into (e.g. main, dev).

gates.description: Commands the builder/inspector run to verify work. Empty string = not available in this repo.

protected.description: Glob patterns the builder must never stage/commit (secrets, generated, machine-local).

codegen.description: Whether and how the repo regenerates code from a schema (e.g. GraphQL).

prerequisite.description: Anything that must be true first (e.g. 'backend running').

visualQA.description: How the inspector visually checks UI work.

conventions.description: House rules the crew must follow, and/or a pointer to the repo doc that states them.

docRef.description: Path to an in-repo conventions doc the agents should read (e.g. AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md).

models.description: Per-role model override applied at dispatch. 'inherit' uses the session model. Defaults tier the crew: strong builder/diagnostician (judgment- and code-heavy), cheaper surveyor/inspector.

personas.description: Display names for each role, used in narration only (invocation handles stay functional). Set by a preset skin or free-text during init.

architectureMap.description: The persisted project-understanding map and the commit it was generated at (for staleness checks).
